issue:1653.title: Feature: carry community labels over re-clustering via member-overlap matching (invalidation exists, carry-over does not)

issue:1824.title: Feature request: no way to control the output language of LLM-generated community labels

issue:2086.title: Community-label split-retry starves its own base case: max_tokens shrinks with batch size, single-community retries get only 88 tokens

issue:2101.title: Step 5 community labeling: sampling truncated member lists causes systematic mislabeling on large communities

local:label-communities-schema-gap.title:
`label_communities` (llm.py) has no JSON-schema constant, unlike
`_EXTRACTION_JSON_SCHEMA`. Extraction is fixed; LABELLING is still broken —
probed on 0.9.25, 42/42 batches failed. Community names come from the free
deterministic `label_communities_by_hub` instead. Re-probe on each bump.
